exercises.stem: Which of the following is the correct adverb form of "gentle"?
exercises.analysis: gentle 以 -le 结尾，变 e 为 y，得到 gently。
quiet 的副词形式是 quietly，多音节词比较级用 more + 原级，即 more quietly。
修饰动词 runs 需要用副词 quickly。quick 是形容词，不能修饰动词。

exercises.stem: "He worked hardly yesterday." 这句话语法正确。
exercises.analysis: hardly 表示「几乎不」，不是 hard 的副词形式。hard 本身既是形容词也是副词，表示「努力地」应该说 He worked hard yesterday.

segments: This is the _____1_____ (good) restaurant in town.
exercises.analysis: 第一个空有 the...in town，用最高级，good 的最高级是 best。第二个空有 than，用比较级，careful 的副词是 carefully，多音节比较级用 more carefully。

exercises.question: 用正确的词填空并说明理由：The child is walking _____. (slow / slowly)
exercises.referenceAnswer: 应该填 slowly。理由：walking 是动词，修饰动词要用副词 slowly，而 slow 是形容词，只能修饰名词。
scoringPoints: 能区分形容词 slow 和副词 slowly
能解释修饰动词需要用副词
